subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou knowest the attachment of my heart and the love of my soul for Thy loved ones, and how I commune with Thee in the dark hours of night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت تعلم تعلق فوادی و حب قلبی باحبائک و کیف اناجیک فی جنح اللیالی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed
